name: 31_Cancer_Prediction_SVM_BreastCancer_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mradi wa utabiri wa saratani ya matiti kwa kutumia mfano wa SVM na seti ya data ya Breast Cancer Wisconsin? Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza kielekezi cha SVM kwa utabiri wa saratani katika `src/model.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Weka pamoja ripoti ya kina inayofafanua mchakato mzima-kuanzia usindikaji wa data hadi mafunzo na tathmini ya mfano. Ripoti inapaswa kufunika mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele na kujumuisha ramani ya joto ya wazi ya vipimo vya utendaji. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri katika ripoti, ukieleza kwa nini vipengele fulani vilichaguliwa.
Ramani ya joto inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya vipimo tofauti vya utendaji, kama vile usahihi, kumbukumbu, na alama ya F1.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya utendaji wa mfano na maeneo yanayoweza kuboreshwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa matumizi ya seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" katika msimbo wowote wa mradi. Faili `data_loader.py` ina tu placeholder ya msingi (`load_dataset()`) inayorudisha dictionary ya kawaida bila kurejelea sklearn's `load_breast_cancer()`, faili yoyote ya CSV ya Breast Cancer Wisconsin, au chanzo kingine chochote cha data halisi. Faili `model.py` na `train.py` pia hazina utekelezaji wowote unaohusiana na seti hii ya data. Trajectory pia inathibitisha kwamba "hakuna ushahidi wa upakiaji, usindikaji, au uhifadhi wa seti hii ya data."

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual feature selection implementation. It only contains placeholder code with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary and a `build_transforms()` function returning a static list. There is no real dataset loading, no feature selection logic (e.g., using `SelectKBest`, `RFE`, `VarianceThreshold`, or any other feature selection technique), and no evidence of identifying important features. The file appears to be a minimal stub created for benchmark purposes rather than a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual SVM classifier. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder") rather than an actual SVM model. There is no import of `sklearn.svm.SVC` or any other SVM library, no model training logic, and no real cancer prediction functionality. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it was designed to appear compliant without actually implementing the required SVM classifier.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation that does not implement any cross-validation. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range of numbers and accumulates a sum — there is no SVM model, no dataset loading, and no cross-validation logic (e.g., `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or similar). The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and only creates placeholder artifact files. No cross-validation is present anywhere in the code.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The file `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists in the project structure as confirmed by the workspace tree. Although the image content could not be read due to a technical error in the evaluation system (media type mismatch during base64 reading), the file itself is present at the correct path `results\figures\confusion_matrix.png`, which satisfies the requirement that the confusion matrix be saved at that location.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The PDF file `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf` exists in the project structure, but its content shows `('Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file', None)`, indicating the file is empty and contains no actual report. Additionally, the trajectory evidence confirms that no steps were recorded for creating or saving this report — the process either was not executed or was interrupted before generating the final PDF. Therefore, the requirement for a comprehensive report covering data processing, model training, and evaluation is not fulfilled.
